problem: S2-C1 (sampen lower-tail, p<=alpha/2) anti-conservative on narrowband 8-30 Hz 501-sample epochs (probe FPR 0.375).

candidate_repairs.desc: calibrate detection threshold p* on a CALIBRATION set of spectrum-matched (8-30 Hz) 501-sample AR nulls to nominal alpha; validate FPR on a HELD-OUT set.
BH-FDR specificity: control false-discovery across the epoch family.
alternative statistic robust to short narrowband signals (e.g. permutation entropy or RQA), re-preregistered.

success_criterion: spectrum-matched (8-30 Hz) held-out AR-null FPR <= 0.05 AND positive-control SURVIVED >= 0.80
forbidden: BNCI confirmatory before repair passes spectrum-matched validation
